channel.title: Urban Craft Uprising Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Urban Craft Uprising Events

item.title: Bend Handmade Market | Brought to you by Urban Craft Uprising
item.description:
Saturday, June 6, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 100 makers and artists selling handmade goods. For those of you who have never been to an Urban Craft Uprising show, our events feature handcrafted goods including jewelry, housewares, clothing, toys, art, bath & body products, paper goods, fiber arts, candles, and so much more!

You’ll find over 100 makers and artists selling handmade goods.

Event details

item.title: Port Townsend Handmade Market
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 75 makers and artists selling handmade goods, as well as food vendors! We will be setting up along several blocks in the downtown area to showcase the best handmade products being made here in the Pacific Northwest. For those of you who have never been to an Urban Craft Uprising show, our events feature handcrafted goods including jewelry, housewares, clothing, toys, art, bath & body products, paper goods, fiber arts, candles, and so much more!

) SATURDAY, July 11th 10AM – 5pm | FREE to attend.

Event details

item.title: Derby Days | Brought to you by Urban Craft Uprising
item.description:
Saturday, July 25, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Magnuson Park

Derby Days features the longest running community bike race in the US.

Event details

item.title: Urban Craft Uprising Summer Show
item.description:
Saturday, July 25, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: MAGNUSON PARK

At our Summer Show, you can now find 130+ makers all selling handmade goods both indoors and out, including jewelry, housewares, clothing, toys, bath & body products, candles, and so much more.

Event details

item.title: Coastal Craft Uprising in Seaside | Brought to you by Urban Craft Uprising
item.description:
Monday, August 17, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 74349 testimonials-widget type-testimonials-widget status-publish category-esf-vendors" style="">

You’ll find 100+ makers and artists selling handmade goods.

Event details

item.title: Urban Craft Market at Fairview
item.description:
Thursday, December 10, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 6 class="xu06os2 x1ok221b" style="text-align: center;">

If you are looking for last minute gifts for the holiday season, join us at 400 Fairview to shop with over 25 amazing handmade makers.

Event details

item.title: Eleventh Hour Makers Market
item.description:
Saturday, December 19, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: PACIFIC PLACE

Urban Craft Uprising is thrilled to partner with Pacific Place to present the Eleventh Hour Makers Market – your holiday shopping salvation.

Event details
